body:
docs/routing/best-provider.md:22 — DOC3 defines profile score before cost, making cost only a tie-break among equal scores. AC3 requires lowest cost among available/quota-OK candidates before locality/name tie-breaks, with profile-specific reorderings documented as overrides.
Bead closing evidence / DDx repo PR — AC6 requires DDx’s CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md to be updated in its own PR and linked in closing notes, but the supplied diff contains no external PR link or closing-note evidence.

post-merge review: BLOCK (flagged for human)
docs/routing/best-provider.md:22 — DOC3 defines profile score before cost, making cost only a tie-break among equal scores. AC3 requires lowest cost among available/quota-OK candidates before locality/name tie-breaks, with profile-specific reorderings documented as overrides.
Bead closing evidence / DDx repo PR — AC6 requires DDx’s CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md to be updated in its own PR and linked in closing notes, but the supplied diff contains no external PR link or closing-note evidence.
result_rev=faafff2804d14c89364b2108fedf3d0262f5e6b9
base_rev=fc52cd84651b0c46b4b1186a74a29d288d7d4eb3

APPROVE
The implementation satisfies the documentation, linkage, and drift-check requirements. The latest `best-provider.md` change fixes the prior cost-baseline issue by making cost part of the baseline order and moving profile scoring into documented overrides.
